Welcome!

Hi, I'm Ganesh Marwaha.

This is my new website, built as a statically generated Jekyll blog but preserving the clean, minimalist look and feel of my previous Bliss theme.

Feel free to look around, read some of my blog posts, or learn more about me.

Ganesh Marwaha

Software Engineer & Head of Engineering for Virtusa. Passionate about Digital Transformation, Microservices, and Developer Experiences.
